allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin\\claude.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\claude.cmd", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\claude-code\\claude.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\AnthropicClaude\\claude.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command claude.exe, claude.cmd, claude -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "not on PATH" }; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Mode; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins")
